item_reports.description: gnoll [GNOL], weight 10, walking capacity 5, moves 2 hexes per month. This race may study horse training [HORS], hunting [HUNT], combat [COMB], armorer [ARMO], carpenter [CARP] and cooking [COOK] to level 5 and all other skills to level 2.
